response: Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to speak about the choices people make in their education. Some choose vocational training, while others pursue a conventional degree. I must say, it's unfortunate that so many are choosing the path of vocational training over a traditional degree. These people are not just choosing a different path—they're choosing to be ignored, to be left behind, to be seen as less capable. It's a shame that so many are not given the opportunity to succeed in a world that values education. I believe in the power of a conventional degree, and I believe in the value of a traditional education. Let's not let anyone's choices define their worth. Let's support those who choose the right path. Let's not let the choices of others define the future of education. Let's all work towards a better tomorrow. Let's not let the choices of others define our future. Let's not let the choices of others define our future.
